name: Layla Al-Subai
whatsapp_message: السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته ليلى 👋 أتمنى تكوني بألف خير! لاحظنا أنك حصلتِ على 65 في آخر اختبار وعندك 6 أيام قبل الاختبار الجديد 📚 نحن هنا نساعدك توصلي لدرجات أفضل، فلا تترددي في التواصل معنا إذا احتجتِ أي شيء ✨
action: Call or message Layla today to introduce yourself, congratulate her on perfect attendance, and offer specific support for the upcoming quiz in 6 days.
reasoning: Layla is at high risk despite perfect attendance and passing the quiz, indicating engagement but content mastery gaps. She has never been contacted by a facilitator, so this first outreach is critical to build rapport and provide targeted intervention before the next assessment.
